events.text: Assessed the motor circuit/disconnect scenario as `needs_more_info` since the single photo angle doesn't capture the nameplate/rating label, torque verification, or working clearance dimension needed to confirm compliance with NEC Art. 430 (430.102, 430.109/110) and 110.26. Findings and corrective actions (get the missing photos/documentation before close-out) are written to `/app/answer.json`.
